settings.text: Private coaching, online programming, and structured programmes — all built around one goal: your results.

settings.title: Personalised Training Plan
settings.description: Designed around your goals, schedule, and starting point. No templates — your plan is built from scratch and updated as you progress.

settings.title: Nutrition Guidance
settings.description: Practical eating frameworks aligned with your training. No extreme diets — sustainable habits that fuel real, lasting progress.

settings.title: Progress Tracking
settings.description: Weekly check-ins, body composition measurements, and performance benchmarks. You always know exactly where you stand and what's next.

settings.title: Direct Coach Access
settings.description: Questions answered fast. Adjustments made in real time. No waiting until next week's session to sort out what's not working.

settings.title: Book a Free Consult
settings.description: A short conversation to understand your goals, training history, and what's held you back so far. No commitment required.

settings.title: Get Your Programme
settings.description: Within 48 hours you receive a fully personalised plan — training, nutrition, and a weekly schedule built around your life.

settings.title: Train and Track
settings.description: Sessions are structured and purposeful. Every rep has a reason. Progress is measured every single week, not just at the end.

settings.title: See the Results
settings.description: Most clients hit measurable results within 4–6 weeks. Twelve weeks changes everything. The data doesn't lie.

settings.text: Every person who walks through the door — or opens the app — gets a plan built for them specifically. The science is applied to your body, your life, and your limits. Not someone else's.

settings.features:
+ Evidence-based training protocols
+ Adaptive to your progress week by week
+ Built around your actual schedule
+ No fads. No shortcuts. No fluff.

settings.question: How many sessions per week do I need?
settings.answer: For most clients, 2–3 sessions per week is the sweet spot. Enough frequency to build real momentum, enough rest to recover and grow. We'll dial in the right number during your consultation.

settings.question: I'm a complete beginner — is this right for me?
settings.answer: Absolutely. Programmes are built from your actual starting point, not an assumed baseline. Many clients have never trained seriously before booking their first session.

settings.question: What's the difference between 1-on-1 and online coaching?
settings.answer: 1-on-1 training means in-person sessions with hands-on guidance in the private studio. Online coaching is fully remote — you follow your programme wherever you train, with weekly check-ins via message or video call.

settings.question: Do I need my own equipment?
settings.answer: For in-person sessions, everything is provided. For online coaching, a basic home setup works fine — we'll design your programme around what you have access to.

settings.title: Still have questions?
settings.text: Book a free consultation — no commitment, no pressure. Just a conversation about what you want to achieve.
